case_title: ELIZABETH MORGAN VS. DANIEL RIGNEY et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT RIGNEY, DANIEL RIGNEY, CHRISTOPHER

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORGAN, ELIZABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIGNEY, DANIEL RIGNEY, CHRISTOPHER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 495 44TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94121, JUDGEMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
